rows.requirement: Create Phase 2 detail document before implementation
evidence: Phase 2 detail document defines objective, scope lock, functional scope, global and per-task non-scope, domain model, API/DTO/error contracts, UI surfaces, detailed E2E scenarios, tests, fixtures, exit gate, risks

rows.requirement: Define finite closed implementation tasks for P2
evidence: Functional scope table defines P2-001 through P2-010 with owner/module, expected behavior, acceptance criteria, E2E references, verification, per-task non-scope, done evidence, and strict phase-exit matrix behavior

rows.requirement: Define mandatory E2E matrix and fixtures for P2
evidence: E2E-010 through E2E-014 are mapped to roles, fixtures, test paths, scenario steps, expected state/API/audit/reload proof, and fixture rules define Tenant A and Tenant B data
